implemented: Safe OpenBB config with safe_mode true and allow_credentials false.
OpenBB engine registry status moved to partial with safe_for_live false.
OpenBB database tables added to schema.
OpenBB adapter supports status, market normalization, best-effort macro ingestion, local DB/file persistence, and structured result objects.
OpenBB CLI handles missing package gracefully.
Dashboard page reads OpenBB status and local ingestion results without external fetch.
Tests cover missing status, normalization, partial symbol failure, no live capability, and CLI missing package path.
partially_implemented: Real provider ingestion cannot be verified because OpenBB is not installed.
Macro endpoint compatibility is best-effort and version-dependent.
Feature bridge converts data shape but is not defensive against missing tables.
not_verifiable: DuckDB execution of new OpenBB tables is not verifiable in this environment.
Actual OpenBB provider API compatibility is not verifiable without OpenBB installed.
low_issues: Feature bridge can crash on missing OpenBB tables if called before DB initialization.
Malformed provider output without timestamp/date can fall back to positional string timestamps.
openbb_adapter.py is large and should be split later if provider support grows.
recommended_next_steps: Install OpenBB in a separate environment and run a no-key provider smoke test.
Warn or skip malformed provider output with no timestamp-like column.
Keep OpenBB research-only and do not add execution features.
